next_steps: Endobronchial ultrasound (EBUS) with fine-needle aspiration of mediastinal/hilar lymph nodes for histopathology and cultures
Serum angiotensin-converting enzyme (ACE) and lysozyme levels
Erythrocyte sedimentation rate (ESR) and C-reactive protein (CRP) measurement
Cardiac MRI or PET-CT to evaluate for cardiac sarcoidosis given the history of syncope and palpitations
Peripheral blood smear and LDH level to screen for hematologic malignancy
